Como 1907 finished a stellar Serie A season in 5th place, boasting the league's stingiest defense with only 28 goals conceded!

Forget the hype, who REALLY ran the Premier League upfront in the early 2000s?

Thierry Henry? An artist, a creator, an Invincible legend. But Ruud van Nistelrooy's ruthless efficiency was UNMATCHED. 95 goals in 150 PL games for Man Utd. Pure, cold-blooded finishing machine. Henry danced, Ruud delivered. Who gets your nod for sheer impact? #PL #FootballHistory #Strikers
